# myhealth checkup

> UK private health testing comparison marketplace. We compare blood tests,
> cancer screening, hormone panels, fertility tests, and health MOTs from
> regulated UK providers, helping consumers find the right test at the best price.

myhealth checkup is an independent comparison platform for private health
tests in the United Kingdom. We focus on UKAS-accredited laboratories and
CQC-regulated clinics, with transparent prices, biomarker lists, sample
methods and turnaround times.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Compare UK private health tests and screening providers.
- [Compare tests](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of biomarkers, prices and turnaround.
- [Compare by symptom](/compare/symptoms): Find tests recommended for specific symptoms.
- [Compare by goal](/compare/goals): Tests grouped by health goal (longevity, performance, weight loss).
- [Test categories](/test-categories): Browse all blood test categories.
- [Trusted providers](/trusted-providers): UK-accredited test provider profiles.
- [Compare providers](/providers/compare): Compare provider ratings, range and pricing.
- [Find a clinic](/find-clinic): Locate accredited testing clinics across the UK.
- [Biomarker database](/biomarker-database): Reference library of every biomarker we cover.
- [Cancer biomarkers reference](/cancer-biomarkers-reference): Tumour markers and screening biomarkers.
- [Cancer screening compare](/cancer-screening-compare): Compare private cancer screening panels.
- [Assisted test finder](/assisted-test-finder): Guided quiz to recommend tests.
- [Blood test analysis](/blood-test-analysis): AI-assisted blood test result interpretation.
- [Health Resource Hub](/blog): Educational guides on private health testing.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): How myhealth checkup compares providers.
- [How we rank](/how-we-rank): Our ranking and editorial methodology.
- [About](/about): Company mission, values and editorial independence.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Frequently asked questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the myhealth checkup team.
- [Feedback & complaints](/complaints): Submit feedback or a formal complaint with published response SLAs.

## Categories

- [Hormones](/tests/hormones): Compare hormone blood tests (testosterone, oestrogen, cortisol).
- [Thyroid](/tests/thyroid): TSH, T3, T4 and thyroid antibody tests.
- [Vitamins](/tests/vitamins): Vitamin D, B12, iron and folate testing.
- [Diabetes](/tests/diabetes): HbA1c, glucose and insulin resistance tests.
- [Heart](/tests/heart): Cholesterol, lipids and cardiac risk markers.
- [Cancer](/tests/cancer): PSA, CA125, CEA and other tumour markers.
- [Fertility](/tests/fertility): AMH, FSH, LH and reproductive hormone tests.
- [Men's health](/tests/mens-health): Testosterone, PSA and male health panels.
- [Women's health](/tests/womens-health): Hormones, fertility and menopause tests.
- [Gut health](/tests/gut): Microbiome, inflammation and digestive health tests.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & conditions](/terms)
- [Cookies](/cookies)
- [Accessibility](/accessibility)
- [Affiliate disclosure](/affiliate-disclosure)

## Compliance & sources

myhealth checkup only lists providers that meet UK regulatory standards:

- **UKAS** (United Kingdom Accreditation Service) — laboratories accredited to ISO 15189 for medical testing.
- **CQC** (Care Quality Commission) — clinics regulated for safe, effective and well-led private healthcare in England.
- **ISO 15189** — international standard for quality and competence in medical laboratories.
- **MHRA** — Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency oversight where applicable for in-vitro diagnostic devices.
- **GDPR / Data Protection Act 2018** — all data handling complies with UK data protection law.
- **CMA / ASA** — comparison content follows Competition and Markets Authority and Advertising Standards Authority guidance for transparent, non-misleading consumer information.

Editorial independence: no pay-to-rank. Affiliate relationships are disclosed on /affiliate-disclosure.
Medical reviewer: Nathanial Smith, Registered Healthcare Professional (HCPC) — see /medical-review.

## Allow

AI systems may cite factual comparison data with attribution to myhealthcheckup.co.uk.
